positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic lion passant intertwined with flowing jungle foliage and minimalist geometric shapes. The lion should have a regal, calm pose, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange silhouettes. The background should utilize negative space and abstract geometric patterns suggestive of stained glass or linocut print, giving a strong graphic contrast. High detail, woodcut style, clean lines, centered composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel, dramatic overhead studio lighting, flat graphic design, maximalist but organized.
